ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fund_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund balance */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the fund balance (e.g., Unrestricted, Restricted, Capital Reserve) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund balance */,
  "initial_balance" TEXT /* Initial balance of the fund */,
  "current_balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the fund */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the fund balance was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the fund balance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget category (e.g., General Operating Budget, Capital Reserve) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget plan */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget category the plan belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the budget plan is for */,
  "budget_amount" TEXT /* Total budget amount for the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget plan (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the budget plan was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the budget plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_plans_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES budget_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial year (e.g., 2020-2021, 2021-2022) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund balance the transaction belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_balance_id FOREIGN KEY ("balance_id") REFERENCES fund_balances ("balance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, accountant) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial transaction or budget plan change */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the audit occurred */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit occurred */,
  "audit_message" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_plan_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget plan history record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget plan */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the budget plan is for */,
  "budget_amount" TEXT /* Total budget amount for the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget plan (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the budget plan was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the budget plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_plan_history_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES budget_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., administrator, accountant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
